$comment: c51 (D-FFI-SYSTIME-UTIMES): ship utimes from <sys/time.h> — sqlite os_unix utimes(zLockFile, NULL) (sqlite3.c:42959, the active #else branch) was missing -> S0001. sys/time.json had only `structs` (struct timeval); c51 adds its first `symbols` array + a `library` map. utimes: fn(ptr<char>,ptr<void>)->i32 (2nd arg = const struct timeval[2]*, here NULL). utimes on a NONEXISTENT path returns -1 (ENOENT) without touching the fs -> exit 42. Gated [elf,macho] (pe uses os_win). RED-ON-DISABLE: remove the symbol -> S0001.
